untranslatable_reason: Double Bottom pattern requires explicit detection of two distinct bottom points and formation height calculation (lowest low subtracted from highest high). These require multi-bar pattern recognition logic not expressible with single-bar indicators and allowed operators. The measure rule target calculation (confirmation point + formation height) requires stored pattern state unavailable in the indicator set. Donchian channels used as approximation for breakout detection, but true pattern identification logic cannot be implemented.
translation_notes: Signal requires pattern detection algorithm to identify two distinct bottoms and measure the formation height. Current rule set uses dc_upper as proxy for breakout above highest high, and dc_middle for reversal exit. Success rate documented as 78% in uptrends with 40% average rise. A proper implementation would need pattern recognition state and multi-bar memory.
